We booked a caravan powered site.
Site was strewn with rubbish, hoses, buckets, chipboard, when we arrived, they cleaned most after my phone call, but not all. If it was a couple of pieces I’d have done it.
Concrete slabs 3 inches above ground level, an ankle breaker. Slab was cracked and dislodged in front corner, needed repairs.
Grass clippings piled up at rear of site, they’re too lazy to deposit in a bin.
Uneven ground with pot holes everywhere, site boundary markings non existent.
I noted steps off cabin decks are uneven, not compliant to regulations, so a safety hazard.
Can’t believe the council allow this park to be so unkept.
Nice place.  Small park not far from the beachfront and restaurants.  Parking very tight. Comfortable unit.  VERY small bathroom.  Pool area looked very nice. Service was great.

🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
An Unforgettable Stay – Thanks to Natalie and the Team!

Our experience at Fraser Coast Holiday Park was nothing short of exceptional. From the moment we arrived, we were welcomed with warmth and professionalism by Natalie and her incredible team, who went above and beyond to ensure our stay was perfect.

The location itself is absolutely stunning – peaceful, beautifully maintained, and a true hidden gem of the Fraser Coast. We stayed at a powered camping site, and were blown away by how clean, spacious, and well-equipped everything was.

The amenities were immaculate:
•	Showers and laundry facilities were spotless and easy to use
•	The recreation room was a great place to unwind and enjoy some downtime
•	And the heated pool and spa? An absolute dream! Perfect for a relaxing soak after a day of exploring

You can really feel the care and pride the staff take in the park – everything runs smoothly, and guests are treated like family.

We can’t thank Natalie and her team enough for such a memorable experience. If you’re thinking about visiting the Fraser Coast, this is the place to stay. We’ll absolutely be back!
We had a powered site for van. Stay here each time we visit Hervey Bay

Natalie has provided us with excellent service right from the start when we booked to arrival where Natalie and Wayne assisted us with parking our caravan. Amenities are clean. Thoroughly enjoying our stay and highly recommend this lovely caravan park.

The friendliest mangers very helpful and accommodating clean amenities and everything you need to enjoy your stay onsite and not far from the beach and cafes and restaurants. Second time here and don’t want to leave , just the ideal location from everything you need
People are so nice at Fraser, great location ,close to the beach , shops and thia shop.

The manager is amazing, our accommodation fell through with two kids and our dogs 7hrs in a trip from nsw, she was able to squeeze us in so late at night during her own dinner and for that we can never be greatful enough. The cabins are lovely with full sized fridge and freezer, everything you could need to cook a meal, hot showers and comfortable soft beds. The night was calm and quiet and we would definitely stay again.

Our friends from Melbourne stayed there while visiting. A great place to stay👍 Due to a mix up, they missed their flight home and stayed 2 more nights. They manager is wonderful and she was able to accommodate them at short notice. We live in Hervey Bay and will highly recommend Fraser Coast holiday park to anyone who visits👍
Beautiful staff ..lovely place and easy to get around Hervey Bay  beach is just down the road walking distance from the park
I really loved staying there and going to come back again and stay longer next time really nice cabin and clean 100 % loved it
Friendly staff..great place to unwind, good fishing on the beach with troysparkslures
Natalie and her team were welcoming and helpful. Pets also very welcomed. Great pool and spa. Experience from day 1 to day 30 was 10/10. Thank you again!!
Cheap and not nasty

Older park, but getting tidied up a treat.
Great spot.

Old fashioned caravan park, with upgraded amenities. Lovely heated pool .
But noisy with ambulance depot virtually next door.
We enjoyed our stay
Managers of this place are absolutely awesome! Couldn't do enough to make us happy. Would recommend this place to anyone!

A lovely park. Clean facilities. A nice pool. A large recreation room and camp kitchen. Helpful, friendly staff. Grassy sites with nice trees. |A spa currently under repair, however there is another spa undercover. |A laundry with 3 washing machines.
Disgusted with the attitude with management.  Cabin was not fit for a dog! Wouldn't recommend this place to anyone.

We stayed in an older Superior cabin. The cabin inside was quite comfortable and spacious and suitable for our needs.
The only negative was that the park appeared quite congested with a lot of caravans/campervans quite close to each other.

Older park. In need of some TLC. Our site was "grass" but really need some time to let the grass grow. As an overnighter or two it was ok. Showers hot and toilets clean.  I given four stars but realistically 3.5.

Lovely location and only walking distance to shops and cafes, etc, a few things to be aware of, parking onsite is extremely small and tight. Stayed in a caravan had a nice quiet stay here. Friendly helpful staff. Backs onto the bowls club &  100m walk to the esplanade. Facilities were very clean.

Great location, very friendly place. Doggo friendly. Very nice and understanding manager. Centrally located which is a plus. Love the giant rec room which has a pool table and book exchange ^.^

Budget accommodation, nice little cabins with what you need for a quiet break away. Lovely and friendly staff.

When we arrived in Hervey bay we hadn’t arranged accommodation yet for ourselves and our small dog, we had been rooftop camping for a couple of weeks and the team at both Fraser of the parks (Emily and Therese) helped us with a pet friendly cabin! We were so happy to have a comfortable cabin, lots of space and close to the esplanade with cafes and restaurants. Great service and location!

Well I ended up staying longer than I intended to and the staff were very accommodating, excuse the pun. Keep up the good work with the clean amenities it was a pleasure. Thank you from Jerry and Millie

Hi

Very outdated cabin, wasn’t cleaned very well as there were bits of dirt on the floor. The crockery was all stained from not being cleaned well, and the bathroom was run down. The pool looked nice but didn’t get to go in and the bed was fairly comfortable. Location was 20 minutes from the beach and the beaches were beautiful.

We had a fantastic stay :) We felt really looked after and the reception team where wonderful and accomodating :) Max went above and beyond for us and make sure we had a nice spot to park our caravan and it was nice and close to amenities. Many thanks.

I stayed here 6 months ago and was very impressed. Not so much this time. There was hair all over the shower walls, mould in the shower, food scraps between cushions of couch, dirty coffee cups in cupboard. Next time I will probably look for somewhere else to stay.
Good location. Nice and quiet. Easy access, boom gates.

We were really excited for our stay, but unfortunately, our experience was far from what we expected. We booked a cabin at this park for almost $200 a night, and it was an absolute disappointment.

Firstly, the cabin was difficult to find, with no clear signage, especially since we arrived after dark. When we finally parked, we were greeted by an awful sewage smell around the area.
There were no bathroom amenities in the cabin at all, being heavily pregnant this was not ideal and for the price per night . I tried to contact the park multiple times to express our concerns, but I never received any response from the staff.
Overall, this stay was a letdown, and unfortunately I would not recommend this stay.

Absolutely loved my stay here—everything was clean, peaceful, and well-maintained. The location was perfect, with easy access to local attractions and beautiful surroundings. The staff were incredibly friendly and welcoming, making the whole experience feel like a home away from home. We highly recommend staying here and we will be back ♡♡♡

We stayed over the weekend and unfortunately didn’t have a great experience. The park was completely full, mostly with permanent residents. Reversing into our spot without hitting something felt nearly impossible.||There was also a dog belonging to one of the permanent residents behind us that barked constantly, which made it hard to relax.||This park might suit long-term stayers better, but it’s not ideal for short-term travellers towing a van. We won’t be back.
Would not recommend this park

We had a one night stay here and had to book last minute. Staff were so kind and made us feel so welcome.
Such a beautiful place and great facilities.
We highly recommend staying here and we will be back ♡

Great park,..not far from waterfront where all the action is located.
Facilities all good ,sites o.k,.just a little tight trying to park van. Staff excellent.
Stayed in a family cabin. Was very clean and tidy
Almost perfect. Only lack mirror inside the budget cabin. Other than that. Can’t complain. Nice stay. Would definitely comeback and recommend it to others.
Spent 2 nights in a lovely 2 bedroom cabin. Everything was clean and the kitchen had everything you would need. Very good value for money.

Filthy. Don't stay there! Don't stay at this park in a cabin!

Excellent great clean cabin fully self contained Excellent

The cabins are beautiful and clean. The pool looks great for you to relax in. I am very pleased we stayed here. Great, friendly staff there too.  Thank you.

This holiday park is the best in the area. It is quiet and off the main drag.  The managers (Pauline and Lindsay) are beyond amazing, very welcoming and have become like part of the family. The apprentice gardener Kerry is lovely. The park itself is so well kept, clean and tidy and has everything you need in a holiday destination. |The only thing that was a very small downfall was the Woolworths delivery trucks that were dropping off peoples groceries, they had no respect for the property and drove around terribly. |Overall we would highly recommend staying here and have already booked again for next Christmas, absolutely love this place and the staff that work there 😆.

Nice big rooms. We had a nice stay! The swimming pool looked good and the laundry space was also good.

Some people are living in their own standing caravan but we didn’t bother that. The only points to improve where that the electric gas pit to cook took so long to boil water and there weren’t clothespins. But we are backpacking so maybe we just are used to hostels! We liked the stay 😁
Great cabins nice and quiet not far from the water of Hervey Bay
The cabin's are very clean and we were really happy staying here. Pool, kid's area, BBQ, just a short drive to the main shopping.
I stayed here two nights in the cabin, was like a mini house with full size kitchen with oven/stove and fridge. Also had air conditioning in the main area. Close to shops and the esplanade.

Incredibly lovely lady at reception. She even kindly forgave us for a stupid damage which will be probably both expensive and time consuming to fix for them. Warm welcome, felt comfortable the whole time. Facilities were clean at any time. Showers are ginormous. Looks as if the park has been recently redone, the sites still look brand-new. Very calm, good place to relax.
Perfect location to sleep before and after the Fraser Island tour.

Average is not really a place for a vacation
Very clean room.  Everything you need for a quick stay.
